ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 破折号（例如，父级 - 名称）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 名称在前（例如，名称 - 父级）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 父级在前（例如，父级 - 名称）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 内部（索引笔记，例如“文件夹/文件夹.md”）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 外部（同级笔记，例如“文件夹.md”位于“文件夹/”旁）

ast.name: error
ast.target: 从图谱中删除文件时出错

ast.name: error
ast.target: 在图谱中重命名文件时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: Abstract Folder: Error exporting debug details
ast.target: 抽象文件夹：导出调试详情时出错

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The frontmatter property key(s) used to define parent notes (e.g., 'parent' or 'folder'). Support multiple names, separated by commas. These are case-sensitive.
ast.target: 用于定义父笔记的 frontmatter 属性键（例如 'parent' 或 'folder'）。支持多个名称，用逗号分隔。这些名称区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The frontmatter property key(s) used by a parent to define its children (e.g., 'children' or 'sub_notes'). Support multiple names, separated by commas. These are case-sensitive.
ast.target: 父笔记用于定义其子笔记的 frontmatter 属性键（例如 'children' 或 'sub_notes'）。支持多个名称，用逗号分隔。这些名称区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the field name in frontmatter to use for the created date (support multiple field names, separated by commas).
ast.target: 设置 frontmatter 中用于创建日期的字段名称（支持多个字段名称，用逗号分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the field name in frontmatter to use for the modified date (support multiple field names, separated by commas).
ast.target: 设置 frontmatter 中用于修改日期的字段名称（支持多个字段名称，用逗号分隔）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the first alias from the 'aliases' frontmatter property as the display name. This is now managed by the priority setting below.
ast.target: 使用 'aliases' frontmatter 属性中的第一个别名作为显示名称。此功能现在由下方的优先级设置管理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine the priority for displaying names. Use frontmatter property names (e.g., 'title'), or use the special keyword 'aliases' for the first alias and 'basename' for the original filename. Separate entries with commas.
ast.target: 确定显示名称的优先级。使用 frontmatter 属性名称（例如 'title'），或使用特殊关键字 'aliases' 表示第一个别名，'basename' 表示原始文件名。条目之间用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically expand all parent folders in the tree view to reveal the active file's location. This ensures that even if a file has multiple parents, all ancestors will be expanded. The active file will always be highlighted.
ast.target: 自动展开树视图中所有父文件夹，以显示活动文件的位置。这确保了即使文件有多个父级，所有祖先文件夹都将被展开。活动文件将始终高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When opening a file, scroll the tree view to ensure the file is visible.
ast.target: 打开文件时，滚动树视图以确保文件可见。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, when you open a file, its direct children folders will be expanded in the tree view.
ast.target: 启用后，打开文件时，其直接子文件夹将在树视图中展开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the target folder will automatically expand when an item is dropped into it.
ast.target: 启用后，当项目被拖放到目标文件夹时，该文件夹将自动展开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep folders expanded even when switching views or restarting Obsidian.
ast.target: 即使切换视图或重启 Obsidian，也保持文件夹展开状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default directory where new root-level notes will be created. If left empty, notes will be created in the vault root.
ast.target: 新创建的根级笔记的默认目录。如果留空，笔记将创建在仓库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the abstract folders view when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动打开抽象文件夹视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which side sidebar to open the view in.
ast.target: 在哪个侧边栏打开视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the abstract folders icon in the left ribbon.
ast.target: 切换左侧功能区中抽象文件夹图标的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Color the indentation lines to visually distinguish tree depth.
ast.target: 为缩进线着色，以视觉区分树深度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the color palette for rainbow indentation guides.
ast.target: 选择彩虹缩进参考线的调色板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, sibling items at the same indentation level will use different colors from the palette, making them easier to distinguish. If disabled, all items at the same depth will share the same color.
ast.target: 启用后，同一缩进级别的同级项目将使用调色板中的不同颜色，使其更易于区分。禁用后，同一深度的所有项目将共享相同的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the search bar at the top of the tree view.
ast.target: 切换树视图顶部搜索栏的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the tree/column view switch button.
ast.target: 切换树/列视图切换按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the button that focuses the active file.
ast.target: 切换聚焦活动文件按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the folder conversion button.
ast.target: 切换文件夹转换按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the collapse all folders button.
ast.target: 切换折叠所有文件夹按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the expand all folders button.
ast.target: 切换展开所有文件夹按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the sorting options button.
ast.target: 切换排序选项按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the filtering options button.
ast.target: 切换筛选选项按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the group selection button.
ast.target: 切换分组选择按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle the visibility of the create new root note button.
ast.target: 切换创建新根笔记按钮的可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of characters shown for file names in right-click menus and dropdowns. Longer names will be truncated.
ast.target: 右键菜单和下拉列表中显示的文件名最大字符数。较长的名称将被截断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine how to resolve naming conflicts in the flat folder structure. Use the immediate parent name or the highest root ancestor name.
ast.target: 确定如何在扁平文件夹结构中解决命名冲突。使用直接父级名称或最高根祖先名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The separator or format used when prefixing or suffixing names to resolve conflicts.
ast.target: 用于在名称前添加前缀或后缀以解决冲突的分隔符或格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine whether to place the parent or ancestor name before or after the note name.
ast.target: 确定将父级或祖先名称放在笔记名称之前还是之后。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Redact file and folder names in the debug export to protect your privacy. Highly recommended when sharing logs for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 在调试导出中编辑文件和文件夹名称以保护您的隐私。在共享日志进行故障排除时强烈建议使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you're experiencing issues or errors after updating from an older version, use this to clean up outdated data from your settings (specifically the legacy 'views' field).
ast.target: 如果您在从旧版本更新后遇到问题或错误，请使用此功能清理设置中的过时数据（特别是旧版 'views' 字段）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all plugin configuration to factory defaults. This is a safe alternative to deleting data.json. It only affects plugin settings like UI preferences and excluded paths. It will not touch your notes or frontmatter properties.
ast.target: 将所有插件配置重置为出厂默认值。这是删除 data.json 的安全替代方案。它只影响插件设置，如 UI 首选项和排除路径。它不会触及您的笔记或 frontmatter 属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will ignore these folders and their contents.
ast.target: 插件将忽略这些文件夹及其内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the full path of a note (.md) to include as a root parent (e.g., 'Notes/Parent.md'). The view will show this note and its children.
ast.target: 输入要包含为根父级的笔记 (.md) 的完整路径（例如 'Notes/Parent.md'）。视图将显示此笔记及其子项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name for the new file (e.g. 'meeting notes', 'project board').
ast.target: 新文件的名称（例如 '会议笔记'、'项目看板'）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the type of file to create.
ast.target: 选择要创建的文件类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all notes and folders directly linked as children to this file will also be deleted.
ast.target: 启用后，所有直接链接为此文件子项的笔记和文件夹也将被删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all notes and folders directly linked as children to these files will also be deleted.
ast.target: 启用后，所有直接链接为这些文件子项的笔记和文件夹也将被删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a corresponding Markdown note for folders if one doesn't exist.
ast.target: 如果不存在，则为文件夹创建对应的 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle files that already have parents defined.
ast.target: 如何处理已定义父级的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to look for the note representing the folder.
ast.target: 在哪里查找代表文件夹的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export the entire abstract structure to folders.
ast.target: 将整个抽象结构导出到文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export starting from a specific parent note.
ast.target: 从特定父笔记开始导出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a name for the folder that will contain the exported structure.
ast.target: 输入将包含导出结构的文件夹名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: ON: Create 'Folder/Folder.md' containing the note content. OFF: Create only the folder 'Folder/' (excludes note content if it has children).
ast.target: 开启：创建包含笔记内容的 'Folder/Folder.md'。关闭：仅创建文件夹 'Folder/'（如果它有子项，则不包含笔记内容）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter an Obsidian icon ID (e.g., 'star', 'lucide-file'), any emoji (e.g., '📝'), or filter the list below. The field's content will be saved as the icon.
ast.target: 输入 Obsidian 图标 ID（例如 'star'、'lucide-file'）、任何表情符号（例如 '📝'），或筛选下方列表。字段内容将被保存为图标。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Expand parent folders for active file
ast.target: 为活动文件展开父文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Expand children when opening a file

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Expand target folder on drag & drop
ast.target: 拖放时展开目标文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 彩虹缩进 - 多样化项目颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示聚焦活动文件按钮

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Search icons or enter custom icon/emoji
ast.target: 搜索图标或输入自定义图标/表情符号

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Convert physical folder to abstract folder
ast.target: 将物理文件夹转换为抽象文件夹

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Create folder structure from plugin format
ast.target: 从插件格式创建文件夹结构

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Target must be a Markdown file to contain other files.
ast.target: 目标必须是 Markdown 文件才能包含其他文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No legacy data found to clean up.
ast.target: 未找到需要清理的遗留数据。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings have been reset to defaults. Please reload Obsidian.
ast.target: 设置已重置为默认值。请重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This note is already in the list.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可清除的活动分组。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 开始文件夹到插件的转换...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有可聚焦的活动文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file to create a group from.
ast.target: 没有可创建分组的活动文件。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 阶段 2/2：正在构建层级结构...

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle focus on active file in abstract tree
ast.target: 在抽象树中切换对活动文件的聚焦

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用活动文件创建分组

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert folder structure to plugin format
ast.target: 将文件夹结构转换为插件格式

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create folder structure from plugin format
ast.target: 从插件格式创建文件夹结构

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to reset all settings? This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 您确定要重置所有设置吗？此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 尚未添加任何父级笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No conflicts detected. Ready to generate.
ast.target: 未检测到冲突。准备生成。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 设置笔记图标/表情符号

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set the default sorting options for the main view and for each group. These settings will be applied when you switch to the group or reset the view.
ast.target: 为主视图和每个分组设置默认排序选项。当您切换到分组或重置视图时，这些设置将被应用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set the default filtering options for the main view and for each group. Enter extensions separated by commas.
ast.target: 为主视图和每个分组设置默认过滤选项。输入以逗号分隔的扩展名。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click on a group to activate or deactivate it.
ast.target: 点击分组以激活或停用它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No abstract folders found. Add parent property to your notes to create a structure.
ast.target: 未找到抽象文件夹。请为您的笔记添加父级属性以创建结构。
